text:

Log:
  'addrlen' does not matter when we need to find the first non-zero bit in
  the byte from the left and 'addrlen' already counted in 'lim'.

  PR:     212121
  Submitted by:   Herbie.Robinson@stratus.com
  MFC after:      7 days
